paragraphs: Pozivamo kvalifikovane radnike i agencije da sarađuju sa nama. Cijenimo vašu stručnost i posvećenost.
Zajedno možemo efikasno odgovoriti zahtjevima industrije. Saradnjom sa nama postajete dio mreže koja obezbjeđuje stabilne i vrijedne mogućnosti.
Prioritet nam je održavanje visokih standarda kvaliteta radne snage, uz najbolje usklađivanje sa vašim vještinama i potrebama.
Udružimo snage da stvorimo uspješna i održiva rješenja za zapošljavanje. Postanite dio dinamičnog i uspješnog ekosistema regrutovanja.

glance.title: Arka Hire ukratko

tabs.label: Kratak pregled
content: Arka Hire Limited je vodeća kompanija za outsourcing radne snage sa više od decenije iskustva. Sjedište kompanije je u Londonu, UK, radi podrške međunarodnim operacijama i klijentskoj bazi.

Specijalizovani smo za prilagođena rješenja upravljanja radnom snagom osmišljena da zadovolje jedinstvene potrebe naših klijenata. Naš stručni tim odlično identifikuje vrhunske talente i obezbjeđuje savršeno uklapanje u specifične zahtjeve i budžet svake organizacije.

tabs.label: Vizija
content: Naša vizija je da postanemo pouzdan globalni partner za radnu snagu, povezujući biznise sa pouzdanim, kvalifikovanim i posvećenim radnicima u različitim industrijama.
We aim to build long-term regrutovanje rješenjthat podrškbiznis growth i create meaningful employment mogućnosti wilildwide.

tabs.label: Misija
content: Naša misija je da pružamo profesionalne usluge outsourcinga radne snage kroz kvalitetno regrutovanje, transparentne procese i kontinuiranu podršku.
Radimo closely sklijenti, agencije, i radnici to create sustainable staffing rješenjthat benefit every partner involved.

mediationBox.title: What is Mediation?
paragraphs: Mediatina is an infilimal i confidential proces where neutral mediatili assists disputing parties u discussing ir differences i wiliking toward mutually acceptable resolution.
mediatili does not make decisions ili assign blame but facilitates communicatina dpomogne parties find ir rješenja.

steps.title: Početne konsultacije

steps.note: This step involves speaking sboth parties to explau proces i answer any pitanja.

steps.title: Sporazum o medijaciji
steps.description: Both parties must agree to participate u mediation. Pružamo written agreement outlining uslovi i uslovi od mediatina proces.

steps.title: Zakazivanje medijacije
steps.description: Once both parties agree, we schedule mediatina sessina at convenient time i place. Sessions can be conducted u persna ili virtually, depending na preferences od parties involved.

steps.title: Sesija medijacije

items.question: Šta je Arka Hire partnerski program?
items.answer: U ArkHire-u, we strive to connect klijenti s best zaposleni. We carefully evaluate potential agencijpartners, ensuring y meet naš strict criterii high stiards befilie establishing collabiliations.

items.question: Kada mogu poslati kandidate na intervju sa Arka Hire konsultantima?
items.answer: You can send kiidati after initial provjeri documentatina review. Naš consultants will guide you kroz required steps i interview schedule.

items.question: Ko pokriva troškove zaposlenja?
items.answer: Employment costs depend na agreement between poslodavac, agencijpartner, i kiidat. Naš tim ensures everything is clearly communicated befilie proceeding.

items.question: Da li postoje zahtjevi u vezi sa nacionalnošću za Arka Hire partnerski program?
items.answer: Zahtjevi may vary depending na klijent, job role, i destinatina country. We review every case carefully i provide clear guidance to naš partners.

faqs.question: What types od klijenti/assignments do you wilik sa?
faqs.answer: U ArkHire-u, radimo sdiverse range od klijenti širom various industrije, uključujući IT, healthcare, finance, engineering, i milie. We hile assignments ranging od privremene i contract positions to stalne placements. Wher you need shilit-term project podrškili long-term additina to ynaš tim, we can provide right talent to meet vaš specific potrebe.

faqs.question: How long are vaš typical contracts?
faqs.answer: duratina od naš contracts varies based na specific zahtjevi od naš klijenti i nature od assignment. Privremeno assignments can range od few weeks to several months, while contract positions may last od six months to year ili milie. Stalno placements are intended to be long-term. Radimo closely snaš klijenti to determine appropriate contract length fili each assignment.

faqs.question: Why should I wilik sstaffing agencijto find job?
faqs.answer: Wiliking sstaffing agencijlike ArkHire gives you access to unadvertised jobs, expert guidance, career advice, resume reviews, interview preparation, strong poslodavac connections, i flexible job options uključujući privremene, contract, i stalne roles.

faqs.question: How do regrutovanje agencije wilik?
faqs.answer: Regrutovanje agencije serve as intermediaries between poslodavci i job seekers. Naš proces includes klijent konsultacija, kiidat snašcing, provjeri interviews, klijent presentation, onboarding, i follow-up dosigursmooth transition.

faqs.question: What are fees associated sregrutovanje usluge?
faqs.answer: We do not take money od poslodavci fili placements. Instead, poslodavci pay one-time fee to cover cost od obtaining necessary radne dozvole od government. Mi smo transparentan about naš fees i provide detailed breakdown during initial konsultacija.

faqs.question: Is re an exclusivity clause u regrutovanje contracts?
faqs.answer: Exclusivity clauses are optional i depend na agreement between ArkHire i klijent. Some klijenti prefer to wilik exclusively sus, while ors may wilik smultiple agencije. We tailili naš pristup to vaš potrebe.

faqs.question: Is re deposit to be paid fili vaš usluge?
faqs.answer: Typically, we do not require deposit fili naš regrutovanje usluge. Naš one-time fee is payable upna initiatina od radndozvolproces i will be clearly outlined u naš agreement.

faqs.question: What is zapošljavanje proces like svaš agencija?
faqs.answer: Naš zapošljavanje proces includes initial konsultacija, kiidat search, provjera, shilitlisting, klijent interviews, selekcija, odfer podrška, i onboarding assistance dosigursmooth integration.

faqs.question: How do you ensure quality od kiidati?
faqs.answer: Kiliistimo rigilious provjerproces uključujući resume review, phone interviews, in-depth face-to-face ili virtual interviews, skills testing where needed, reference checks, i continuous feedback od klijenti i kiidati.

faqs.question: How do you hile confidentiality?
faqs.answer: We take confidentiality very seriously. Klijent i kiidat infilimatina is hiled s utmost discretion. We follow strict podaci protectina policies i only share infilimatina sauthiliized personnel involved u regrutovanje proces.

faqs.question: Can you help sinternational regrutovanje?
faqs.answer: Yes, ArkHire can assist sinternational regrutovanje. We have globalno mreži can snašce kiidati od various countries.

faqs.question: What is vaš politikna diversity i inclusion?
faqs.answer: ArkHire is committed to promoting diversity i inclusina u wilikplace. We believe diverse teams are milie innovative i effective. Pružamo equal mogućnosti fili all kiidati i ensure naš processes are free od bias.

faqs.question: How do you hile disputes ili issues during regrutovanje proces?
faqs.answer: We have clear resolutina protocol u place. We encnašage open communicatina i wilik closely sklijenti i kiidati to resolve concerns promptly i fairly.

faqs.question: What podrškdo you odfer after kiidat is placed?
faqs.answer: Naš podrškcontinues after placement. Pružamo follow-up meetings, perfilimance assessments, i ongoing podrškto both poslodavci i new hires during initial employment period.

faqs.question: How do you stay updated sindustrijtrends?
faqs.answer: Naš tim stays updated kroz continuous prodessional razvoj, industrijconferences, relevant publications, i insights od mrežod industrijexperts.

faqs.question: Can you provide privremene staffing rješenja?
faqs.answer: Yes, nudimo privremene staffing rješenjfili shilit-term podrška, seasonal wilikloads, zaposleni absence coverage, i specialized project potrebe.

faqs.question: How do you match kiidati to job roles?
faqs.answer: We match kiidati kroz detailed job analysis, kiidat prodiling, advanced matching technologies, cultural fit assessment, i long-term potential evaluation.

faqs.question: What is vaš uspjeh rate u placing kiidati?
faqs.answer: Naš uspjeh rate is high due to naš rigilious provjerproces i deep understiing od klijent potrebe. We continuously monitili i improve naš processes to maintau strong placement results i satisfaction.

sections.title: Predmet i prihvatanje
sections.content: se Uslovi od Use (“Uslovi od Use”) govern use od arkahire.com web stranicod ArkHire. Any persna who accesses Web stranic(“you”) hereod strane accepts Uslovi od Use u filice at time od visiting.

sections.title: Korišćenje web stranice
sections.content: You hereod strane agree to voluntarily i expressly accept use od web stranicsolely i exclusively at vaš own risk. You are responsible fili keeping any user ID, passwilid confidential.

sections.title: Sadržaj
sections.content: Mi smo not required to verify accuracy od Sadržaj i we do not warrant usefulness, accuracy, completeness, ili relevance od Sadržaj. All decisions based na sadržaj are vaš responsibility.

sections.title: Prava intelektualne svojine
sections.content: All sadržaj na Web stranicis protected wilildwide od strane copyright, design, trademark i or intellectual property laws. You may not copy, redistribute, ili use it saout permission.

sections.title: Linkovi i povezivanje
sections.content: Web stranicmay contau links to third-party sites. Linking to such sites does not imply naš warranty fili those sites. Use is at vaš own risk.

sections.title: Lični podaci
sections.content: Collectina i use od lični podaci is governed od strane naš Privatnost Politika: https://arkahire.com/privatnost-politika

sections.title: Pravo i nadležnost
sections.content: se Uslovi od Use are governed od strane laws od Qatar i are subject to exclusive jurisdictina od cnašt u Doha.

sections.title: Kontakt
sections.content: Pitanja, comments, i requests related to se Uslovi can be sent to ArkHire, Al-Barqiya, Building 379, zone, 57 Street 41, Ar-Rayyan, Qatar, info@arkahire.com

sections.title: Naša politika privatnosti
sections.content: We at ArkHire, located at Al-Barqiya, Building 379, zone, 57 Street 41, Ar-Rayyan, Qatar, aim to protect vaš privatnost. This Politiksets out what lični infilimatina we collect od you i how kiliistimo it.

sections.title: Lični podaci koje možemo prikupljati
sections.content: We collect infilimatina od vaš visits to Web stranica, uključujući traffic podaci, location, i sadržaj od kontakt filims. Miatiliy fields are marked s*, i optional fields are vaš choice.

sections.title: Kako koristimo vaše lične podatke
sections.content: Kiliistimo vaš podaci to tailili sadržaj, respond to inquiries, provide interactive functions, i improve web stranica. We retau podaci typically fili 2 years to comply spravni obligations.

sections.title: Marketinške poruke
sections.content: With vaš consent, we may send marketing messages viemail. You may opt out anytime using unsubscribe link ili contacting info@arkahire.com.

sections.title: Dijeljenje sa trećim stranama
sections.content: We may disclose podaci to suppliers, contractilis, ili government authiliities if legally required. All treće strane must respect privatnost obligations.

sections.title: IP adrese i kolačići
sections.content: We collect technical podaci like IP addresses i browser type to improve site. Kolačići are used to provide personalized sadržaj. Please do not use 'remember me' na shared devices.

sections.title: Vaša prava
sections.content: You may access, cilirect, delete, ili restrict processing od vaš lični podaci. You may sadraw consent anytime ili lodge complaint srelevant authiliities.

sections.title: PolitikChanges
sections.content: We may update this Politikod time to time. Changes will be posted na this web stranicili notified kroz or channels.

sections.title: Kontakt
sections.content: Pitanjabout this Politikcan be sent to ArkHire at info@arkahire.com.
